'''âb-w-y-sh''' ('''kabawyeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monoculture|monoculture]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-w-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monoculture|monoculture]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-w-y-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kabawyeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibawyeshoko|thibawyeshoko]] || [[word:jibawyeshoko|jibawyeshoko]] || [[word:shibawyeshoko|shibawyeshoko]] || [[word:kibawyeshoko|kibawyeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubawyeshoko|thuthubawyeshoko]] || [[word:jujubawyeshoko|jujubawyeshoko]] || [[word:shushubawyeshoko|shushubawyeshoko]] || [[word:kukubawyeshoko|kukubawyeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubawyeshoko|thubawyeshoko]] || [[word:jubawyeshoko|jubawyeshoko]] || [[word:shubawyeshoko|shubawyeshoko]] || [[word:kubawyeshoko|kubawyeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubawyeshoko|thubawyeshoko]] || [[word:jubawyeshoko|jubawyeshoko]] || [[word:shubawyeshoko|shubawyeshoko]] || [[word:kubawyeshoko|kubawyeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobawyeshoko|thobawyeshoko]] || [[word:jobawyeshoko|jobawyeshoko]] || [[word:shobawyeshoko|shobawyeshoko]] || [[word:kobawyeshoko|kobawyeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobawyeshoko|thobawyeshoko]] || [[word:jobawyeshoko|jobawyeshoko]] || [[word:shobawyeshoko|shobawyeshoko]] || [[word:kobawyeshoko|kobawyeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbawyeshoko|thĂŠbawyeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠbawyeshoko|jĂŠbawyeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠbawyeshoko|shĂŠbawyeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠbawyeshoko|kĂŠbawyeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabawyeshoko|thathabawyeshoko]] || [[word:jajabawyeshoko|jajabawyeshoko]] || [[word:shashabawyeshoko|shashabawyeshoko]] || [[word:kakabawyeshoko|kakabawyeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabawyeshoko|thabawyeshoko]] || [[word:jabawyeshoko|jabawyeshoko]] || [[word:shabawyeshoko|shabawyeshoko]] || [[word:kabawyeshoko|kabawyeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabawyeshoko|thabawyeshoko]] || [[word:jabawyeshoko|jabawyeshoko]] || [[word:shabawyeshoko|shabawyeshoko]] || [[word:kabawyeshoko|kabawyeshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shabawyeshithi|shabawyeshithi]] || [[word:shabawyeshiji|shabawyeshiji]] || [[word:shabawyeshishi|shabawyeshishi]] || [[word:shabawyeshiki|shabawyeshiki]]
